column1: # AID ↔ employee/contractor ID map for bnprs-sessions.sh (new AID.NNN notation)

#   ec2_history  : yes = legacy session memory to migrate into 08-memory/long-term/
# Tier ranges: 001-010 principal | 011-025 senior | 026-075 engineering | 076-100 support
